description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a dark metallic receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the stock and handguard. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable magazine, and a prominent front sight post. The handguard and stock are both finished in a medium brown wood grain, while the pistol grip appears to be a darker reddish-brown polymer or wood. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device, and the receiver has a utilitarian, robust design typical of military rifles. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the rear sight near the receiver and the front sight at the end of the barrel.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, front sight post, and muzzle device.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length, wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's width and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger, and the details of the receiver and stock.
